items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Delivery status tracking' feature, but the provided evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented or operational. Without concrete evidence to support the requirement, it cannot be validated, leading to a blocked status. The lack of specific evidence pointers related to delivery status tracking indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
